name: aedin-web
description: AEDIN Phase 5b — public web UI (Astro 5 + Tailwind 4 + better-sqlite3, static-first)

scripts.build: npm run build:search && astro build && node scripts/build-atlas-data.js && pagefind --site dist
scripts.build:verify: test -d dist/_worker.js && test -d dist/source && test -d dist/claim && test -d dist/region && test -d dist/interaction && test -d dist/atlas && test -d dist/crop-web && test -f dist/data/atlas.json && test -f dist/data/atlas-highlights.json && test -d dist/pagefind || (echo '✗ BUILD VERIFY FAILED: dist/ is missing expected outputs (_worker.js/ (SSR bundle dir for / and /entity/*), source/claim/region/interaction/atlas/crop-web/data/atlas.json/data/atlas-highlights.json/pagefind). Refusing to deploy.' && exit 1)
scripts.deploy: node scripts/assert-main-branch.cjs && AEDIN_USE_PUBLISHED=1 npm run build && npm run build:verify && wrangler pages deploy dist --project-name=agroeco --branch=main --commit-dirty=true
scripts.deploy:upload: npm run build:verify && wrangler pages deploy dist --project-name=agroeco --branch=main --commit-dirty=true
